appearance.subtitle: Customize each product's look — name, colour, theme, logo and watermark. Without customization the system default is used.
appearance.textsNone: No customizable texts for this product
appearance.textsHint: Empty = use the system default. Filled fields override the default for this customer.
appearance.subtitle_customer: Customize each product's look for this customer.

dataTransferPage.title: Data transfer
dataTransferPage.subtitle: Choose which ingest channels the platform offers to customers. Customers can only enable the channels you turn on here.
dataTransferPage.sftpDesc: Customers fetch/drop CSV over SFTP (their own or Operia's gateway).
dataTransferPage.sftpHostHint: Host or IP, optionally with port (e.g. sftp.operia.com or 10.0.0.5:2222). Point a DNS name here so the address stays stable if you move servers.
dataTransferPage.test_timeout: Timeout — the server did not respond
dataTransferPage.emailDesc: Customers email the CSV as an attachment to an Operia address.
dataTransferPage.emailDomainHint: The domain customer addresses are formed under (e.g. operia.com → nordwind@operia.com).
dataTransferPage.antispoofHint: Reject mail where sender verification fails — protects against forged senders.
dataTransferPage.antispoofStrictHint: Also reject softfail/none DMARC. Stricter, but may reject legitimate senders with no DMARC policy.
dataTransferPage.allowlistRequiredHint: Secure-by-default: a company’s email ingest is rejected until at least one allowed sender is set.
dataTransferPage.scheduleDesc: Run the import only once a day at a fixed time instead of continuously.
dataTransferPage.scheduleHint: The default time customers' imports run (local time). Each customer can override this.

companyDataTransfer.subtitle: Choose how this company's employee CSV reaches Operia. Only channels enabled by Operia are shown.
companyDataTransfer.noneEnabled: Operia has not enabled any data transfer channels yet.
companyDataTransfer.passwordHint: Set a password the customer uses to log in to SFTP.
companyDataTransfer.passwordKeep: Fill in only to change the password; otherwise the current one is kept.
companyDataTransfer.emailDesc: CSV sent as an email attachment.
companyDataTransfer.emailNameHint: The local part of the address (e.g. nordwind → nordwind@operia.com).
companyDataTransfer.identifierTaken: That username or email name is already used by another company.
companyDataTransfer.allowedSendersHint: One per line: a full address (hr@customer.com) or a whole domain (@customer.com). Only mail from these senders is processed — the rest is rejected and logged.
companyDataTransfer.allowedSendersWarning: No sender restriction: anyone who knows the address can submit master data. Add at least one allowed sender.
companyDataTransfer.allowedSendersBlocked: Email ingest is blocked: the platform requires at least one allowed sender. Add one to enable the channel.
companyDataTransfer.emailNameInvalid: The email name may only contain lowercase letters, digits, dots, hyphens and underscores.
companyDataTransfer.scheduleDesc: Run the import only once a day at a fixed time instead of continuously.
companyDataTransfer.scheduleHint: The import runs at this time (local time).

logsPage.searchPlaceholder: Filter by type, company, user, message…
logsPage.empty: No events in the selected range.

msg.retentionChanged: Retention policy changed — audit: {{audit}} days, import: {{import}} days
msg.reasonEmailError: The email could not be sent
msg.reasonSmsError: The SMS could not be sent

routesPage.name: Name
routesPage.optimizeHint: let the route decide the best order of the stops
routesPage.calcNeedsFromTo: Enter From and To to calculate.
routesPage.calcProviderError: Route calculation for the selected provider isn't available yet.
routesPage.calcMissingKey: No API key is configured for the maps provider.

routeDetail.deactivateDescription: Inactive routes are hidden from planning; data is kept.
routeDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand the route will be permanently deleted.

configureHomeDesign.title: Home design
configureHomeDesign.subtitle: Design your own Home start page: the product tile grid, the colour theme, and the welcome content.
configureHomeDesign.hint: Starts from Operia's default design and shows only the products your company has access to. Once you save, your design is used on Home instead of the default.

homeDesignPage.title: Home design
homeDesignPage.subtitle: Design the Home start page: the product tile grid, the colour theme, and the welcome content. Changes apply to every customer's Home.
homeDesignPage.tilesHint: Drag to reposition; the other tiles flow around them. Use the icon on a tile to switch it between 1×1 and 2×2.

handheldDesignPage.title: Handheld design
handheldDesignPage.subtitle: Design the handheld home screen: welcome content, icon theme and tile appearance. Changes apply to every customer's handheld.
handheldDesignPage.iconThemeHint: Happy is the handheld's original look (emoji). Desktop uses exactly the same icons as the web app. Outline, Solid and Mono use Android's own Material icons. Emoji carry their own colors, so a tile's color has no effect in Happy.
handheldDesignPage.tilesHint: Drag to move a tile; the others flow into place. Use the gear to change its appearance and the cross to remove it from the home screen. Tiles only appear for customers entitled to each feature.
handheldDesignPage.noTiles: No tiles on the home screen. Use “Add tile” to put one back.
handheldDesignPage.colorEmojiHint: Emoji carry their own colors — the color applies once you pick another icon theme.
handheldDesignPage.folderHint: Tiles on the sub-page — configure, reorder or add/remove. Shown on the handheld sub-page in the same order.

operiaGeneralPage.title: General
operiaGeneralPage.subtitle: General platform settings.
operiaGeneralPage.refreshIntervalHint: How often screens automatically fetch fresh data from the database — e.g. so new parcels appear on their own.
operiaGeneralPage.rangeHint: Between 0 and {{max}} seconds. 0 turns auto-refresh off.

operiaMapsPage.title: Maps & routes
operiaMapsPage.subtitle: Choose the maps and routing provider used for route planning.
operiaMapsPage.orsDesc: Free, OpenStreetMap-based. Good for Denmark; gives free-flow drive times (no live traffic).
operiaMapsPage.googleDesc: Best data and live-traffic ETAs, but requires an API key and a billing account.
operiaMapsPage.keySecretHint: Stored only as a Supabase edge secret and used server-side — never in the database or browser. Set or replace it with:

templatesPage.title: Templates
templatesPage.subtitle: Edit the platform's templates (e.g. the invitation email).

auth.signInError: Sign-in failed. Check your email and password.

setPassword.title: Welcome to Operia
setPassword.subtitle: Choose a password to activate your account.
setPassword.tooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters.
setPassword.invalidTitle: The link is invalid or expired
setPassword.invalidBody: Ask an administrator to send a new invitation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.usernameDescription: Display name used across the system
settings.appearanceSubtitle: Choose how Operia looks and behaves
settings.themeModeDescription: Choose how Operia looks to you. Select a single theme, or sync with your system.
settings.navModeDescription: Classic fixed sidebar, or a dropdown menu in the bottom left.
settings.languageChoiceDescription: Applies to the whole interface. Danish is the default.

reports.subtitle: Generate reports on the parcel flow and download them as PDF, CSV or Word
reports.custodyPlaceholder: Scan or type the parcel's barcode …
reports.snapshotNote: The report is a snapshot of the situation right now.
reports.errGeneric: The report could not be generated

summary.title: Operations report
summary.desc: Key figures, status distribution and breakdowns by department, carrier and parcel type for a chosen period.

exceptions.title: Exceptions report
exceptions.desc: Parcels requiring action right now: unassigned, overdue and rejected.

departments.title: Department report
departments.desc: Volume, processing time and open parcels per department for a chosen period.

custody.title: Parcel history
custody.desc: Full chain of custody for one parcel — every event from the immutable log (NIS2).

doc.custodyLine: Chain of custody for parcel {{barcode}} — from the immutable event log

stats.subtitle: Key figures and trends for the parcel flow
stats.flowDesc: Parcels received and delivered in the period
stats.outcomeDesc: Status of parcels received in the period
stats.deptDesc: Most parcels received in the period
stats.leadDesc: Median hours from intake to handover, per week

parcels.title: Parcels
parcels.empty: No parcels yet — they will appear here once intake starts.

parcelDetail.rejectDescription: Mark the parcel as rejected. The action is logged in the parcel's history and can't be undone from the app.
parcelDetail.rejectReasonPlaceholder: E.g. damaged on arrival, wrong address …
parcelDetail.rejectConfirm: Reject parcel {{barcode}}? This marks it as rejected and records it in the parcel's history.
parcelDetail.notRejectable: This parcel can't be rejected in its current state ({{status}}).
parcelDetail.handoverActionDescription: Confirm handover to the receiver with an optional signature.
parcelDetail.handoverDescription: Hand over parcel {{barcode}} to the receiver.
parcelDetail.relocateActionDescription: Record an internal move to a new location or movement status.
parcelDetail.relocateDescription: Choose the new movement status and location for {{barcode}}.
parcelDetail.notRelocatable: Cannot be moved while status is "{{status}}".

employees.title: Employees
employees.name: Name
employees.empty: No employees yet — import the employee directory (Flow 0).

products.comingSoon: This product is on the way.
products.notEnabled: This product is not enabled for your company.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try again — if it persists, contact support.
errors.notFoundDescription: The address does not exist or has moved.
errors.duplicate: A record with these details already exists.
errors.inUse: This can't be done because the record is used elsewhere.
errors.invalidValue: One of the values is invalid.
errors.tooLong: One of the values is too long.
errors.conflict: The action conflicts with an existing record.
errors.retryable: The system was busy. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: The file could not be uploaded. Please try again.

common.emailFailed: The user was created, but the invitation email could not be sent.
common.emailExists: An account with that email already exists.
common.noPermission: You don't have permission for this action.
common.nameTaken: This name is already in use.

handlingClasses.name: Name
handlingClasses.allowProxyInfo: Allows someone other than the receiver to collect the parcel. Recorded as proxy collection at handout.
handlingClasses.allowLeaveInfo: Allows the parcel to be left at an agreed location without personal handover.

receive.barcodePlaceholder: Scan barcode/QR or type the code
receive.duplicateWarning: An open parcel with this barcode already exists.
receive.unassignedHint: No receiver selected — the parcel will be registered as 'unassigned'.
receive.sessionEmpty: No parcels received in this session yet.
receive.noCompany: No company available — create a company first.
receive.unassignedBody: No receiver is selected. The parcel will be registered as unassigned and shown under Dashboard → Exceptions until a manager assigns a receiver.

dataTable.deleteDescription: You are about to delete {{count}} {{entity}}. This action cannot be undone.
dataTable.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that this will permanently delete the selected {{entity}} and all associated data.

handout.notFound: No open parcel found with that barcode.
handout.proxyHint: Different person than the receiver — recorded as proxy collection.
handout.proxyBlocked: The handling class does not allow collection by anyone but the receiver.
handout.noReceiverWarning: The parcel has no receiver — assign one under Edit parcel first.
handout.sessionEmpty: No parcels handed out in this session yet.

employeesActions.anonymizeDescription: Personal data (name, initials, email, phone, employee no.) is blanked permanently. The row is kept so parcel history stays intact. This action cannot be undone.
employeesActions.anonymizeAcknowledge: I understand that personal data is deleted permanently and cannot be recovered.
employeesActions.anonymizedHadLogin: Note: {{count}} of them had a login account. The account still holds name and email and must be removed separately under Users.

locationDetail.deactivateDescription: Inactive locations cannot be picked at intake, but history is kept.
locationDetail.deleteDescription: Removes the location permanently. Parcels pointing to it only lose the location field.
locationDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that the location is deleted permanently.

unsaved.title: Unsaved changes
unsaved.description: You have unsaved changes in the detail pane. Discard them?

employeeDetail.deactivateDescription: Inactive employees cannot be picked as receivers; history is kept.
employeeDetail.anonymizeDescription: Blanks personal data permanently (GDPR). The row and parcel history are kept.
employeeDetail.deleteDescription: Removes the employee permanently. Test-data cleanup only — normally use Deactivate or Anonymize.
employeeDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that the employee is deleted permanently.
employeeDetail.duplicateIdentifier: Employee no. or NFC card is already used by another employee.
employeeDetail.importManagedHint: This employee comes from the HR import — changes may be overwritten on the next import. Create a manual employee with "+ New" if you want a row the import never touches.
employeeDetail.employeeNoLockedHint: The import's key — locked for imported employees. Changing it would make the next import deactivate this employee and create a duplicate.

userDetail.emailHint: The login email is managed by the user's account and cannot be changed here.
userDetail.accessHint: Roles control which pages the user can access. A user can have several roles; every user can access the home page.
userDetail.roleManagerDescription: Full administration: all pages including company configuration.
userDetail.roleDataManagerDescription: Access to the Master Data pages: Employees, Departments, Lockers and Import/Export.
userDetail.roleParcelHandlerDescription: Access to the parcel pages Receive parcel and Hand out parcel.
userDetail.roleParcelManagerDescription: As parcel handler, plus Parcel dashboard, Parcels, Reports and Statistics.
userDetail.roleHandheldParcelHandlerDescription: Can register and hand out parcels on the handheld.
userDetail.roleAssetManagerDescription: Access to all pages under Assets.
userDetail.roleInventoryManagerDescription: Access to all pages under Inventory.
userDetail.roleHandheldInventoryHandlerDescription: Can update stock levels on the handheld.
userDetail.roleRoutePlannerManagerDescription: Access to all pages under Route planning.
userDetail.roleHandheldRoutePlannerDescription: Can use the route planner on the handheld.
userDetail.roleNotDefinedDescription: Not defined yet — only grants access to the home page.
userDetail.roleHandheldHint: Signs in on the Android handheld app — not the web admin.
userDetail.roleFinalReceiverDescription: Can receive their own parcels; no system access.
userDetail.removeDescription: Removes the user's system access to this company. The login account itself is not deleted.
userDetail.removeAcknowledge: I understand that the user's access is removed.
userDetail.selfHint: You cannot remove your own access.
userDetail.inviteIntro: Creates a login account and gives it access to the selected company with the chosen roles. Runs in one go — rolls back if anything fails.
userDetail.sendInvitation: Send invitation instead of a fixed password
userDetail.sendInvitationHint: The user gets an email with a link and sets their own password.
userDetail.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters — or leave empty

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.cardHint: Set a new password for the user, or send them a link to choose one themselves.
changePassword.intro: Set a new password directly, or switch this on to email the user a reset link.
changePassword.sendResetHint: The user gets an email with a link and chooses a new password themselves.
changePassword.tooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters.
changePassword.noEmail: The user has no email, so a reset link cannot be sent.

customerDetail.purchasingEmailHint: Purchase orders from Inventory are sent here. Can be overridden per order.
customerDetail.purchasingEmailInvalid: The purchasing email is not a valid email address.
customerDetail.languagesInvalid: The default language must be one of the supported languages.
customerDetail.currenciesInvalid: The default currency must be one of the supported currencies.
customerDetail.logoHint: Paste a public URL for the logo — or upload a file and the field is filled in automatically.
customerDetail.quietHoursHint: Notifications (SMS/email) are not sent during quiet hours.
customerDetail.name: Company name
customerDetail.productsHint: Products are whole systems the customer buys access to. They control which screens and menus are available.
customerDetail.deactivateDescription: A deactivated company is blocked from login; data is kept.
customerDetail.deleteDescription: Removes the company and all its data permanently (users, parcels, master data). Test-data cleanup only.
customerDetail.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone and deletes all of the company's data.
customerDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that the company and all its data are deleted permanently.
customerDetail.newIntro: Creates a new company (tenant), assigns the chosen products and features, and creates the first admin user. Runs in one go — rolls back if anything fails.
customerDetail.sendInvitation: Send invitation instead of a fixed password
customerDetail.sendInvitationHint: The admin gets an email with a link and sets their own password.
customerDetail.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters — or leave empty
customerDetail.pickProduct: Enable a product above to see and choose its features.
customerDetail.logoDropHint: Drag an image here, or click to choose
customerDetail.logoNotImage: The file must be an image.

departmentDetail.noActions: No actions available — departments are maintained by the employee import.
departmentDetail.deleteDescription: Removes the department permanently. Test-data cleanup only. Employees and parcels merely lose the department field.
departmentDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that the department is deleted permanently.

handlingClassDetail.deleteDescription: Removes the class permanently. Parcels pointing to it only lose the handling field.
handlingClassDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that the handling class is deleted permanently.

carrierDetail.deleteDescription: Removes the carrier permanently. Parcels pointing to it only lose the carrier field.
carrierDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that the carrier is deleted permanently.
carrierDetail.deactivateDescription: Inactive carriers cannot be picked at intake; history is kept.

importPage.title: Import
importPage.subtitle: Employees and departments from CSV (Flow 0). The import is the system of record: employees missing from the file are deactivated; manually created ones are untouched.
importPage.dropHint: Drag a CSV file here, or click to choose
importPage.expectedColumns: Expected columns (first row = headers, separated by ; or ,):
importPage.columnsRequired: medarbejder_nr and navn are required; the rest are optional.
importPage.encodingError: The file is not valid UTF-8 (æ/ø/å are corrupted). Save the file as UTF-8 and try again.
importPage.missingColumns: The file is missing required columns: {{cols}}
importPage.emptyFile: The file contains no data rows.
importPage.parseError: The file could not be read as CSV.
importPage.previewTitle: Preview — nothing has been applied yet
importPage.applyBusy: Another import is running for the company right now — try again in a moment.
importPage.receiptFailed: The import failed midway — see details in the history. Re-run the file; already-applied rows become updates.
importPage.fileRejected: The file was rejected — nothing was changed.
importPage.logSubtitle: All import runs — including rejected and failed ones. This is the alert surface for malformed files.
importPage.expectedColumnsConfigured: Expected columns (separated by "{{sep}}" — configured under Import → Configuration):
importPage.separatorMismatch: The file does not appear to use the separator "{{sep}}" — it looks like "{{found}}". Fix the file, or change the separator under Import → Configuration.

lockerDetail.keyniusDescription: The vendor's (Keynius) ID for the locker wall — used by the integration.
lockerDetail.deactivateDescription: Inactive lockers cannot be used for handout; history is kept.
lockerDetail.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that the locker is deleted permanently.

operiaLocalization.title: Localization
operiaLocalization.subtitle: Which languages and currencies the platform offers, and the system defaults.
operiaLocalization.supportedHint: Languages available for the UI, templates and notifications.
operiaLocalization.defaultHint: Used when neither user nor company has chosen a language.
operiaLocalization.defaultMarker: Default system language — cannot be deselected.
operiaLocalization.supportedCurrenciesHint: Currencies available for prices and invoicing.
operiaLocalization.defaultCurrencyHint: Used when neither user nor company has chosen a currency.
operiaLocalization.currencyDefaultMarker: Default system currency — cannot be deselected.

configureConfig.title: Configuration
configureConfig.localizationSubtitle: The company's languages, currency and timezone.
configureConfig.logoSubtitle: The company's logo — shown in notifications and on labels.
configureConfig.templatesSubtitle: The company's templates — package label and parcel notifications.
configureConfig.templateUsesDefault: Using the platform default — save to create a company-specific version.
configureConfig.resetDescription: The company's own version is deleted and the platform default is used again. This cannot be undone.
configureConfig.resetToast: Template reset to the platform default.
configureConfig.notifResetDescription: The company's own reminder days are removed and the platform defaults apply again.
configureConfig.notifResetToast: Notification settings reset to the platform default.

labelDesigner.designHint: Drag the elements into place. Click an element to change font and position.
labelDesigner.clickToAdjust: Click an element in the design to adjust it.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.subtitlePlatform: Platform defaults for notifications — quiet hours and per-type rules.
notificationsPage.subtitleCompany: The company's notification settings — quiet hours and per-type rules.
notificationsPage.reminderHint: Parcels left uncollected for at least this many days get the reminder.
notificationsPage.maxRemindersHint: Applies only to the last enabled reminder type (the one that repeats) — with both enabled, reminder 1 is sent once. 0 = no limit (stops when the parcel is collected).
notificationsPage.activationHint: Platform master switches — nothing is sent until the relevant one is enabled.
notificationsPage.channelsHint: Which channels notifications are sent on. SMS also requires the SMS notifications add-on per customer.
notificationsPage.assetFirstNotice: The first notification is sent on the loan's expiry day. The reminders below follow a number of days after expiry.
notificationsPage.assetReminderHint: Loans not returned at least this many days after expiry get the reminder.
notificationsPage.assetMaxRemindersHint: Applies only to the last enabled reminder type (the one that repeats) — with both enabled, reminder 1 is sent once. 0 = no limit (stops when the loan is returned).
notificationsPage.testSmsHint: Send a single SMS via GatewayAPI to confirm sender ID and delivery.
notificationsPage.testSmsPlaceholder: Recipient number with country code, e.g. 4512345678

productsPage.title: Products & features
productsPage.subtitlePlatform: What the platform offers. Disabled products and features are hidden from customers and blocked in access control.
productsPage.subtitleCompany: The company's products and features with expiry dates.
productsPage.readOnly: Products and features are managed by DCA Logic. Contact DCA for changes.

carrierAgreements.subtitle: Carrier / aggregator agreements are used by the margin model. Keys are stored securely and can only be replaced or removed.
carrierAgreements.name: Name
carrierAgreements.keyHint: The key is stored securely and can never be read again — only replaced or removed.
carrierAgreements.newIntro: DCA’s own agreement with a carrier or an aggregator.
carrierAgreements.deactivateDescription: Deactivated agreements are not used by the margin model; the key is kept.
carrierAgreements.deleteDescription: Removes the agreement and its key permanently.
carrierAgreements.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone. The key is deleted permanently and cannot be recovered.
carrierAgreements.deleteAcknowledge: I understand that the agreement and its key are deleted permanently.

shippingBilling.title: Shipping & billing
shippingBilling.subtitle: Shipping and invoicing rules. Margin model: Operia owns the shipping agreement and adds a margin. BYOC: the customer uses their own shipping agreement, and you invoice for the system.
shippingBilling.modelMargin: Margin — Operia owns the shipping agreement
shippingBilling.marginHint: Customer price = cost price × (1 + percent) + fixed amount. Set one to 0 if you only want to use the other.
shippingBilling.byocHint: The customer pays the carrier directly. You invoice a subscription and/or fee per shipment. Set one to 0 if it should not be used.
shippingBilling.readOnly: The shipping model is managed by DCA Logic. Contact DCA for changes.
shippingBilling.resetDescription: The company's own rates are removed and the platform defaults apply again.
shippingBilling.resetToast: Shipping model reset to the platform default.
shippingBilling.agreementsHint: Used with BYOC: the customer's own aggregator account or carrier agreement. The key is stored securely and can never be shown again — only replaced or removed. It is used only server-side at booking.
shippingBilling.agreementsElsewhereHint: Customer shipping agreements (BYOC) are per customer and are managed under Configure → Shipping & billing with the customer selected — or on the customer's tab under Operia → Customers.

assetsConfig.title: Assets
assetsConfig.subtitle: Platform defaults for the Assets product. Features are enabled per customer under Products & features; the customer's own categories, locations and import belong to the Assets module.
assetsConfig.ttlHint: The starting value in the «Expiry» field when the customer loans via locker. Always changeable per loan.
assetsConfig.categoriesHint: Starter set suggested for new customers. The customer's own categories are edited in the Assets module.

assetsPage.name: Name
assetsPage.tagTaken: This asset number is already in use.
assetsPage.deactivateDescription: Inactive assets cannot be loaned out; history is kept.
assetsPage.deleteDescription: Removes the asset permanently. Test-data cleanup only.
assetsPage.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone and removes the asset and its history.
assetsPage.deleteAcknowledge: I understand the asset is deleted permanently.
assetsPage.lendOutDescription: Register the asset as lent out to a recipient. Only assets in stock can be lent out.
assetsPage.lendExpiryHint: The default comes from the platform loan setting. Can be changed per loan.
assetsPage.lendContactHint: Provide at least one of email and SMS.
assetsPage.notInStock: The asset is not in stock.
assetsPage.returnDescription: Closes the loan and puts the asset back in stock.
assetsPage.noOpenLoan: The asset is already back in stock.
assetsPage.barcodePlaceholder: Scan barcode/QR or enter the code
assetsPage.barcodeTaken: This barcode is already in use.
assetsPage.sendReminderBody: The borrower will immediately receive a reminder to return "{{asset}}" via the enabled channels (email/SMS).
assetsPage.reminderNoChannel: No channel available. Add an email or SMS number and enable notifications.
assetsPage.reminderFailedToast: Could not send the reminder. Please try again.
assetsPage.reminderNeedsContact: Add a valid email or SMS number to send a reminder.
assetsPage.emailBounced: This address bounced — the last reminder couldn't be delivered.
assetsPage.statusLockedOnLoan: Asset is on loan — register a return to change the status.

assetCategoriesPage.name: Name
assetCategoriesPage.deactivateDescription: Inactive categories cannot be chosen for new assets; existing ones are kept.
assetCategoriesPage.deleteDescription: Removes the category permanently. Existing assets just lose the category field.
assetCategoriesPage.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone. Assets in the category are kept without a category.
assetCategoriesPage.deleteAcknowledge: I understand the category is deleted permanently.

assetLocationsPage.name: Name
assetLocationsPage.deactivateDescription: Inactive locations cannot be chosen for new assets; existing ones are kept.
assetLocationsPage.deleteDescription: Removes the location permanently. Existing assets just lose the location field.
assetLocationsPage.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone. Assets at the location are kept without a location.
assetLocationsPage.deleteAcknowledge: I understand the location is deleted permanently.

importConfig.title: Import configuration
importConfig.subtitle: The file format for the employee import: header/footer, separator and column order.
importConfig.hasHeaderHint: The file's first row is column headers and is skipped.
importConfig.hasFooterHint: The file's last row is a total/footer row and is skipped.
importConfig.separatorHint: The character separating the columns. Default: , (comma)
importConfig.activeFieldsHint: The columns in the file, in this order.
importConfig.potentialFieldsHint: Fields that can be added to the import.

inventoryPage.name: Name
inventoryPage.deactivateDescription: Inactive items are excluded from stock and reordering; history is kept.
inventoryPage.deleteDescription: Removes the item permanently. Test-data cleanup only.
inventoryPage.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone and removes the item and its history.
inventoryPage.deleteAcknowledge: I understand the item is deleted permanently.

common.reasonDuplicateValue: {{field}} appears more than once in the file
common.reasonValueTaken: {{field}} is already used by another asset

assets.title: Asset import
assets.subtitle: Assets from CSV. The import is the register's source of record: assets missing from the file are deactivated. Categories and locations are created automatically from the name columns.
assets.configSubtitle: The file format for the asset import: header/footer, separator and column order.
assets.logSubtitle: All import activity — import runs (including rejected/failed) and configuration changes. This is the alert surface for malformed files.
assets.exportSubtitle: Download the active assets as CSV in exactly the format the import expects — so the file can be edited and imported again.

inventory.title: Inventory import
inventory.subtitle: Inventory items from CSV. The import is the register's source of record: items missing from the file are deactivated. Categories and locations are created automatically from the name columns.
inventory.configSubtitle: The file format for the inventory import: header/footer, separator and column order.
inventory.logSubtitle: All import activity — import runs (including rejected/failed) and configuration changes. This is the alert surface for malformed files.
inventory.exportSubtitle: Download the active inventory items as CSV in exactly the format the import expects — so the file can be edited and imported again.

logDrains.title: Log drains
logDrains.subtitleCompany: Forward your company's audit log (security events) to your own observability/SIEM platform in near real-time. Useful for NIS2: central log management and alerting. Events are delivered with a watermark, so nothing is lost or duplicated.
logDrains.subtitlePlatform: Platform level: forward ALL tenants' audit events to DCA's central observability/SIEM platform.
logDrains.name: Name
logDrains.endpointHttpHint: Events are POSTed as newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON). A token (if set) is sent as Bearer.
logDrains.endpointLokiHint: Loki base URL (e.g. https://logs-prod.example.com). /loki/api/v1/push is appended automatically.
logDrains.secretHint: Sent to the destination on delivery. Stored write-only and cannot be read back.
logDrains.secretSetHint: A secret is already set. Leave blank to keep it, or enter a new one to replace.
logDrains.empty: No log drains yet. Create one to forward audit events.
logDrains.tokenHint: A shared secret you choose. Use the SAME value on your receiving endpoint. Stored write-only and cannot be read back.
logDrains.deleteAck: I understand the drain is deleted permanently.
logDrains.lokiUsernameHint: Grafana Cloud: your Loki instance/user ID (from the "Send Logs" page). Used as the basic-auth username.

exportPage.employeesSubtitle: Download the active employees as CSV in exactly the format the import expects — so the file can be edited and imported again.

importReasons.encoding: The file is not valid UTF-8
importReasons.empty: The file contains no data rows
importReasons.separatorMismatch: Wrong separator (expected "{{sep}}", the file looks like "{{found}}")
importReasons.noCsvAttachment: The email contained no CSV attachment
importReasons.badAttachment: The CSV attachment could not be decoded
importReasons.tooManyDeactivations: Rejected as a safeguard: the file would deactivate {{count}} of {{active}} active employees (possibly a truncated file). Run the import manually if it is correct.
importReasons.importBusy: Another import was already running for the company — the file was not processed. Send it again.

condition.photoHint: A photo is required for a documentation entry.

feedback.title: What would you like to share?
feedback.ideaPlaceholder: My idea for improving Operia is…

integrationsPage.title: Integrations
integrationsPage.subtitle: Which external systems Operia offers, and what new customers inherit.
integrationsPage.enableDesc: While off, the AD integration is hidden from all customers.
integrationsPage.anonymizeRetiredDesc: Default for new customers. Customers can override it.
integrationsPage.anonymizeExplainer: Employees removed from AD who still have parcels in progress get “EX-” prepended to their name, so managers can sort out the remaining parcels. Once every parcel is resolved, the employee is anonymized. Anonymization cannot be undone: name, email, phone and employee number are permanently removed, while the parcel history is kept.
integrationsPage.syncIntervalHint: How often employees are fetched from AD. Every run is logged under Import runs.

companyEntra.subtitle: Connect your Microsoft Entra ID (Active Directory) as the source for the employee directory.
companyEntra.noneOffered: No integrations are available for your company.
companyEntra.notOffered: The AD integration has not been enabled by Operia.
companyEntra.enableDesc: The employee directory is fetched from Active Directory instead of CSV files.
companyEntra.csvConflict: SFTP or email import is enabled. The two sources cannot run at the same time — turn off CSV import before enabling AD sync.
companyEntra.clientSecretHint: The secret is stored encrypted on the server and cannot be shown again. Enter a new one to replace it.
companyEntra.incomplete: Fill in all three fields to test.
companyEntra.test_incomplete: Tenant ID, Client ID and Client Secret must all be filled in.
companyEntra.test_invalid_secret: Client secret rejected. Check that you copied the Value column — not the Secret ID.
companyEntra.test_expired_secret: The client secret has expired. Create a new one in Azure.
companyEntra.test_unknown_app_or_tenant: Unknown app or tenant. Check that Tenant ID and Client ID are not swapped.
companyEntra.test_missing_consent: The app is missing admin consent for User.Read.All in Azure.
companyEntra.test_auth_failed: Could not sign in to Microsoft Entra ID.
companyEntra.test_apply_failed: The sync could not be completed.
companyEntra.test_tooManyDeactivations: The run would deactivate too many employees and was rejected. Check the group filter.
companyEntra.groupHint: Without a filter the whole directory is fetched. Guest accounts are always excluded.
companyEntra.initialsSourceHint: The name of an Entra attribute, e.g. mailNickname. Leave empty to derive initials from the name.
companyEntra.dryRunRequired: Run a dry run before the first real sync so you can see what would happen.
companyEntra.dryRunDone: Dry run completed — sync can be run.

configureHandheldDesign.title: Handheld design
configureHandheldDesign.subtitle: Your own setup of the handheld home screen.
configureHandheldDesign.inherited: You are using Operia's default design. If you save a change, your company gets its own design and later changes to the default no longer apply.
configureHandheldDesign.hint: Your company has its own handheld design. All your handhelds use it instead of Operia's default.
